stemHtml: An aeroplane should be equipped with a Mach trimmer, if:

options.a: stick force per g strongly decreases at low Mach numbers.
options.b: at transonic Mach numbers the aeroplane displays an unacceptable decrease in longitudinal stick force stability.
options.c: at high IAS and low altitude the aeroplane displays an unacceptable decrease in longitudinal stick force stability.
options.d: stick force stability becomes independent of IAS and altitude.
